title: One Last Time
description: You're losing the battle, but suddenly, you remember what you can do.
body:
One Last Time is a mod where you can make your swords extremely powerful, in the expense of VERY low durability. (4 hits!)

(Be careful because once you hit an enemy, a lightning bolt will strike them.)

(Curseforge version: https://legacy.curseforge.com/minecraft/mc-mods/one-last-time)

THIS MOD REQUIRES CLOTH CONFIG AND FABRIC API.


----------------------------------- 


Recipes:

Buffed Ingot: 4 diamonds in each corner, 4 gold ingots in place of the gaps around the corner, and a netherite ingot in the middle.

Any Total Sword: Buffed Ingot + Sword of your choice. (not gold though because there is no point)

One Last Sword: All of the Total Swords in the Crafting Table
